HOME

RESOURCES

CODING

  1. W3 Schools - beginner friendly html/css/javascript demos
  2. MDN Docs - encyclopedia for everything html/css/javascript related
  3. Stack Overflow - if you have a question about your code there is a 99% chance someone also had the same issue here
  4. Neocities Thumbnail - script that lets you control the thumbnail of your page
  5. Deploy to Neocities Action - HIGHLY RECOMMEND DOING THIS! updates your site SUPA FAST
  6. Scripted Resources - lot of great snippets for decorating your site
  7. Ribo Zone Templates - templates that i never ended up using... (i mainly looked at it to understand html)

GRAPHICS

  1. GifCities - searchable gif engine
  2. Sadthemes Pixels - animated pixels organized by color
  3. Greenbox Pixels - archive of pixels designed in the 90s
  4. Pixel Safari - nicely organized archive of pixels
  5. Pokemon Sprites - almost every single sprite from all pokemon games
  6. Windows 7 Icons - downloadable icons from Windows 7 interface
  7. Images on this Site - most of the images i used are in this folder. if it isn't, then it's from me!

PROGRAMS I USE

  1. Visual Studio Code - i code everything in this
  2. Clip Studio PRO - what i use for most of my digital art
  3. Adobe(pirated vers.) - all adobe products FOR FREE here...don't tell anyone i showed you this (NOTE: don't download the master collection, i've heard it's buggy)
  4. MS Paint - browser MS Paint (i also use the one originally installed on windows)
  5. Aseprite - pixel art program
  6. HEAVYPAINT - sick ass program that emulates a lot of oil/gouache brushwork
  7. Wiggly Paint - fun little program that makes your art wiggly!
  8. Blender - FREE! 3D! program! i've only used it like 5 times though (one day i will master it trust)
  9. Magic Poser - super simple 3d program. great for visualizing difficult perspectives
  10. FL Studio - music program. pirated version here

PERSONAL FAVORITES

  1. Free Media Heck Yeah - piracy yarharr
  2. yt-dlp - command that downloads youtube videos
  3. Khinsider - archive of downloadable video game music
  4. Mother Forever - archive of all things Mother related
  5. Tunebat - finds the key and BPM for any song (not always accurate though)
  6. Gametabs - guitar tabs for video game music
  7. Ishkur's Guide to Electronic Music - cool timeline of electronic music
  8. Spotify Downloader - downloads any song on spotify
  9. A Dictionary of Color Combinations - color palette inspo
  10. BIG BOOL - only person on youtube that makes interesting vgm playlists
  11. Map Crunch - displays a random view from Google Maps

MISC

  1. Status Cafe - status update widget
  2. Piclog - image widget
  3. Atabook - guestbook
  4. Dithermark - dithers an image
  5. JPEG Optimizer - compresses JPGs
  6. Tiny PNG - compresses PNGs
  7. Remove Background - i usually remove bgs in photoshop, just bookmarking this for later to try out
  8. 3ds Hacks Guide - super easy guide to gain access to 5 TRILLION GAMES
